beer.beer_description:
Aahhhh dude, so I was like traveling throughout the world and I had this trippy experience somewhere. There was like all this crazy voodoo going on with like, weird chanting man...It was nuts. And they were like feeding me raisins, caramel, tropical fruits at the same time, and then some dank resinous stuff (and I mean woah!). They were rubbing me with gold man, and that's when it got weird. I don't actually know what they achieved, but after that whole experience, I was like "Dude! If you combine all those flavours together, that's a pretty killer beer!" So I came back to the brewery and started messing around with some malty and fruit notes, and came up with this gold number. Don't worry, I left the actual
voodoo hoo haa out

items.badge_description: You’ve unlocked today’s Recappd badge! Any drink you check in helps power your faction as we race toward choosing the next Untappd icon. Explore your year in beer at Recappd and come back tomorrow! Recappd is presented by Crescent Canna: Try the bestselling THC drinks in the country and enjoy $20 OFF with code: UNTAPPD20. Shop Now >

Sometimes you need a break from all the hops, fruits, and spices. What better way than with a crisp, smooth Blonde Ale or Golden Ale? Basic but delicious. That's 45 different beers with the style of Blonde Ale or Golden Ale. Try 5 more for Level 10!

items.badge_description: You’ve unlocked today’s Recappd badge! Any drink you check in helps power your faction as we race toward choosing the next Untappd icon. Explore your year in beer at Recappd and come back tomorrow!
Beer is often better with friends. Besides, drinking socially is what we're all about! You've checked in with at least 10 other people within 5 hours.
Drinking with friends is fun. Right? You've checked in with at least 4 other people within 2 hours.

Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 5 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 2!

items.badge_description: While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 35 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 8!

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 85 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 18!

Sometimes you need a break from all the hops, fruits, and spices. What better way than with a crisp, smooth Blonde Ale or Golden Ale? Basic but delicious. That's 5 different beers with the style of Blonde Ale or Golden Ale. Try 5 more for Level 2!
